subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Two letters from thee have been received. Now I am writing the answer, but I have no opportunity to write
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان دو نامه از شما رسید حال بتحریر جواب مشغولم ولی فرصت جواب
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @business; financial; property matters
